item.title: QjackCtl [Music Production]
item.itunes:title: QjackCtl [Music Production]
item.itunes:author: rncbc
item.itunes:summary:
QjackCtl
(Music Production)
QjackCtl is a simple Qt application to control the JACK sound server daemon, specific for the Linux Audio Desktop infrastructure.
Written in C++ around the Qt framework for X11, most exclusively using Qt Designer.

Provides a simple GUI dialog for setting several JACK daemon parameters, which are properly saved between sessions, and a way control of the status of the audio server daemon. With time, this primordial interface has become richer by including a enhanced patchbay and connection control features.
[read more]
item.description:
QjackCtl
(Music Production)
QjackCtl is a simple Qt application to control the JACK sound server daemon, specific for the Linux Audio Desktop infrastructure.
Written in C++ around the Qt framework for X11, most exclusively using Qt Designer.

Provides a simple GUI dialog for setting several JACK daemon parameters, which are properly saved between sessions, and a way control of the status of the audio server daemon. With time, this primordial interface has become richer by including a enhanced patchbay and connection control features.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
QjackCtl
(Music Production)
QjackCtl is a simple Qt application to control the JACK sound server daemon, specific for the Linux Audio Desktop infrastructure.
Written in C++ around the Qt framework for X11, most exclusively using Qt Designer.

Provides a simple GUI dialog for setting several JACK daemon parameters, which are properly saved between sessions, and a way control of the status of the audio server daemon. With time, this primordial interface has become richer by including a enhanced patchbay and connection control features.
[read more]

item.title: USB Modem Bulk SMS Software [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:title: USB Modem Bulk SMS Software [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:author: bulksmsgroup
item.itunes:summary:
USB Modem Bulk SMS Software
(Chat & Messenging)
User friendly USB Modem Bulk SMS Software facilitates to connect multiple numbers of GSM modems to your computer system for sending promotional campaigns, greetings, news alerts, notifications, Standard messages and other personalized SMS as per need. Bulk SMS software For USB Modem is fully capable to send text messages in English as well as Non-English characters in short time span.

[read more]

item.title: Bulk Text Messaging Software [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:title: Bulk Text Messaging Software [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:author: bulksmsgroup
item.itunes:summary:
Bulk Text Messaging Software
(Chat & Messenging)
Is it possible to broadcast infinite text messages regarding product promotion? Download remarkable and well compatible Bulk Text Messaging Software that help user to easily deliver mass text messages like news alerts, weather information, new product release, event reminder, seasonal greeting, invitation and other personal SMS etc from computer system via USB modem. Innovative mobile SMS sending software allow user to save thousands of text messages as templates with date and time at any location on computer system for future usages.

[read more]

item.title: Mobile Bulk SMS Software [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:title: Mobile Bulk SMS Software [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:author: pctomobilesms1
item.itunes:summary:
Mobile Bulk SMS Software
(Chat & Messenging)
Text messaging application for Mac OS X. Use Mobile Bulk SMS Software to broadcast alert notifications from mac machine. Buy best featured Mobile Bulk SMS Software that is used to compose and send unlimited text messages from PC to thousands of mobile numbers using android mobile phone worldwide. Professionally developed Mobile Bulk SMS Software permits user to communicate with thousands of mobile users by sending unlimited text messages from mac machine using android phone. Reliable PC to mobile Mac bulk SMS utility for android phone empowers user to broadcast group text messages from PC to list of mobile numbers without internet connection.re you still finding out solution to send unlimited text messages via mac machine to mobiles? Just download Mobile Bulk SMS Software that provides perfect solution to compose and send instant group text messages from PC using android phones. Powerful mobile marketing application saves sent messages to templates for further use in future. Compatible mac bulk SMS application also provides option to skip duplicate number entries while sending messages from apple Macintosh OS X machine.

[read more]

GSM Mobile SMS Gateways Mac

Software delivers alert/reminder messages. SMS Gateways tool sends professional message from Apple PC via using GSM mobile. GSM Mobile SMS Gateways Mac Software is easily available at www.pctomobilesmsgateways.com to compose infinite number of text messages and deliver to multiple phonebooks contact number.www.pctomobilesmsgateways.com offers GSM Mobile SMS Gateways Mac Software broadcasts single text messages to targeted audience from Apple laptop via connecting GSM phone devices without requiring any internet connection. Text SMS program delivers personalized messages to your friends, relatives, family member and other special member.

item.title: claudemods ArchIso Creator [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: claudemods ArchIso Creator [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: claudemods
item.itunes:summary:
claudemods ArchIso Creator
(Utilities)

claudemods ArchIso Creator v1.0
Sailing the 7 seas like Penguin's Eggs, Remastersys, Refracta, Systemback and father Knoppix!

i made this for creating Arch .iso for my distributions
since its getting alot harder with things breaking these days
big recommendation to Penguin's Eggs
https://github.com/pieroproietti/penguins-eggs i used it before making this

you should be able to copy a dwarfs to the iso no problem
im yet to test this with my dwarfs i converted from sqaushfs
i will also be adding this into this application for those who want to convert
i managed to skim 400mb off a squashfs with compression 7 with dwarfs



installation
like most my applications you need qt 6.7.2 or above installed
please download .zip and .desktop needed
extract .zip to /opt
run .desktop

steps
1: create squashfs/dwarfs "currently not added"
2: select sqaushfs/dwarfs + edit boot name + iso name ect....
3: create an iso in the applications directory e.g /opt/claudemods-ArchIso-Creator/



v1.0 17/09/2024
current functions
select squashfs or dwarfs
change boot menu name
change .iso name to what you want
create a bootable Arch iso



v1.01 not released yet
things being currently added before testing
i have a squashfs creator script i need to test again before adding
sqaushfs to dwarfs convertor i already have a working script
i want to fix the grub artwork selected for now please wait

[read more]
item.description:
claudemods ArchIso Creator
(Utilities)

claudemods ArchIso Creator v1.0
Sailing the 7 seas like Penguin's Eggs, Remastersys, Refracta, Systemback and father Knoppix!

i made this for creating Arch .iso for my distributions
since its getting alot harder with things breaking these days
big recommendation to Penguin's Eggs
https://github.com/pieroproietti/penguins-eggs i used it before making this

you should be able to copy a dwarfs to the iso no problem
im yet to test this with my dwarfs i converted from sqaushfs
i will also be adding this into this application for those who want to convert
i managed to skim 400mb off a squashfs with compression 7 with dwarfs



installation
like most my applications you need qt 6.7.2 or above installed
please download .zip and .desktop needed
extract .zip to /opt
run .desktop

steps
1: create squashfs/dwarfs "currently not added"
2: select sqaushfs/dwarfs + edit boot name + iso name ect....
3: create an iso in the applications directory e.g /opt/claudemods-ArchIso-Creator/



v1.0 17/09/2024
current functions
select squashfs or dwarfs
change boot menu name
change .iso name to what you want
create a bootable Arch iso



v1.01 not released yet
things being currently added before testing
i have a squashfs creator script i need to test again before adding
sqaushfs to dwarfs convertor i already have a working script
i want to fix the grub artwork selected for now please wait

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
claudemods ArchIso Creator
(Utilities)

claudemods ArchIso Creator v1.0
Sailing the 7 seas like Penguin's Eggs, Remastersys, Refracta, Systemback and father Knoppix!

i made this for creating Arch .iso for my distributions
since its getting alot harder with things breaking these days
big recommendation to Penguin's Eggs
https://github.com/pieroproietti/penguins-eggs i used it before making this

you should be able to copy a dwarfs to the iso no problem
im yet to test this with my dwarfs i converted from sqaushfs
i will also be adding this into this application for those who want to convert
i managed to skim 400mb off a squashfs with compression 7 with dwarfs



installation
like most my applications you need qt 6.7.2 or above installed
please download .zip and .desktop needed
extract .zip to /opt
run .desktop

steps
1: create squashfs/dwarfs "currently not added"
2: select sqaushfs/dwarfs + edit boot name + iso name ect....
3: create an iso in the applications directory e.g /opt/claudemods-ArchIso-Creator/



v1.0 17/09/2024
current functions
select squashfs or dwarfs
change boot menu name
change .iso name to what you want
create a bootable Arch iso



v1.01 not released yet
things being currently added before testing
i have a squashfs creator script i need to test again before adding
sqaushfs to dwarfs convertor i already have a working script
i want to fix the grub artwork selected for now please wait

[read more]

item.title: PC to Mobile Bulk SMS Software [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:title: PC to Mobile Bulk SMS Software [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:author: pctomobilesms1
item.itunes:summary:
PC to Mobile Bulk SMS Software
(Chat & Messenging)
Text message sender tool forward new alert. Computer to mobile messaging application broadcast mass messages. PC to Mobile Bulk SMS Software application is available on company home page www.pctomobilesmsgateways.com that is helpful to promote business product marketing. PC to Mobile Bulk SMS Software is downloaded from www.pctomobilesmsgateways.com to transmit interview notification, news and price alert without any internet connection. SMS sender program provides comprehensive way to broadcast product promotion date. Professional SMS sender program is offered by company on www.pctomobilesmsgateways.com website which is helpful to communicate with business partner on time you are in meeting with client. PC to Mobile Bulk SMS Software is developed with innovative technology for creating standard message and sends on international network.

[read more]

item.title: AAAAXY [Jump N Run]
item.itunes:title: AAAAXY [Jump N Run]
item.itunes:author: divverent
item.itunes:summary:
AAAAXY
(Jump N Run)
AAAAXY is a nonlinear 2D puzzle platformer taking place in impossible spaces.
Although your general goal is reaching the surprising end of the game, you are encouraged to set your own goals while playing. Exploration will be rewarded, and secrets await you!

So jump and run around, and enjoy losing your sense of orientation in this World of Wicked Weirdness. Find out what Van Vlijmen will make you do. Pick a path, get inside a Klein Bottle, recognize some memes, and by all means: don't look up.

And beware of a minor amount of trolling.

To reach the end, a new player will take about 4 to 6 hours, a full playthrough can be finished in about 1 hour and the end can be reached in about 15 minutes.
[read more]
item.description:
AAAAXY
(Jump N Run)
AAAAXY is a nonlinear 2D puzzle platformer taking place in impossible spaces.
Although your general goal is reaching the surprising end of the game, you are encouraged to set your own goals while playing. Exploration will be rewarded, and secrets await you!

So jump and run around, and enjoy losing your sense of orientation in this World of Wicked Weirdness. Find out what Van Vlijmen will make you do. Pick a path, get inside a Klein Bottle, recognize some memes, and by all means: don't look up.

And beware of a minor amount of trolling.

To reach the end, a new player will take about 4 to 6 hours, a full playthrough can be finished in about 1 hour and the end can be reached in about 15 minutes.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
AAAAXY
(Jump N Run)
AAAAXY is a nonlinear 2D puzzle platformer taking place in impossible spaces.
Although your general goal is reaching the surprising end of the game, you are encouraged to set your own goals while playing. Exploration will be rewarded, and secrets await you!

So jump and run around, and enjoy losing your sense of orientation in this World of Wicked Weirdness. Find out what Van Vlijmen will make you do. Pick a path, get inside a Klein Bottle, recognize some memes, and by all means: don't look up.

And beware of a minor amount of trolling.

To reach the end, a new player will take about 4 to 6 hours, a full playthrough can be finished in about 1 hour and the end can be reached in about 15 minutes.
[read more]
